title: “The NSA Hired Me To Speak To Aliens!” -Sergeant Dan Sherman
summary: Dan Sherman, a retired Air Force technical sergeant, describes being recruited into a highly classified NSA program called Project Preserve Destiny in the early 1990s. He claims he was genetically altered as a fetus to become an 'intuitive communicator' capable of telepathically receiving and transmitting messages with alien beings, and details his training process involving sine wave visualization and mental tone matching.

acronyms.definition: The agency in charge of all signals intelligence that America conducts
Military career field that analyzes electronic communications and emissions from enemy sources for intelligence value
Tests used to qualify and place recruits into military career fields
Temporary assignment to a different location for training or other purposes
A person genetically modified to have heightened ability to telepathically communicate with alien beings
Classified program designed to genetically manage human fetuses to create intuitive communicators
Military service record documenting a service member's time in the military

events.description: United States allegedly came into contact with an alien species (possibly referencing Roswell)
Dan Sherman's mother was allegedly abducted and Sherman was genetically altered as a fetus

key_claims.claim: The US government came into contact with an alien species around 1947 and started Project Preserve Destiny in 1960
Project Preserve Destiny was designed to genetically manage human fetuses so they would have heightened ability to intuitively communicate with aliens
Sherman's mother was abducted by aliens and Sherman was genetically altered as a fetus in 1963 to become an intuitive communicator
Gray projects exist above black projects, with black projects providing cover and funding for gray projects
Intuitive communicators were being trained for some future event where the ability would help military command and control
Sherman was trained to affect sine waves on a computer screen using only mental concentration
The government selected underprivileged families for the genetic modification program because a certain percentage of offspring would want to join the military
